positive: A whimsical and uplifting scene featuring a group of diverse stylized anthropomorphic woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, bears) celebrating in a vibrant forest clearing. The style should be inspired by modern Scandinavian children's illustration mixed with whimsical fantasy. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and expressive, joyful poses. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep emerald green, muted terracotta, warm mustard yellow, and sapphire blue. High contrast between the subjects and the lush foliage background. Composition must be centered and visually balanced, perfect for a repeating seamless pattern or a single print graphic. Studio lighting quality, vector art crispness, graphic novel ink detailing, 300 DPI print quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, realism, photo, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poor composition, messy background, grayscale
